name: Current Affairs in Indian Economy & TN Dev. Admin. (8): UPI's 2026 Records & Global Dominance

sourceRefs.label: edunovations.com/theresearchers.us - UPI's May 2026 record (₹29.90 trillion); 2025 full-year stats (228.5 billion transactions); UPI's global real-time-payments dominance

researchNotes: Ninth Economy current-affairs topic (8th lap). UPI/digital-payments statistics are inherently fast-moving (new monthly records appear constantly) — handled by explicitly dating each figure to its specific month/year rather than presenting any single number as a permanently fixed 'current' fact.

reading.intro: Covers UPI's record-breaking 2026 transaction volumes and its position as the world's largest real-time payments platform.

qa.question: What record did UPI set in May 2026?
qa.answer: ₹29.90 trillion in transaction value — the highest monthly transaction value since UPI's 2016 launch — alongside 23.2 billion transactions (a 4% increase over the previous month).

qa.question: What were UPI's full-year 2025 statistics?
qa.answer: 228.5 billion transactions (a 33% year-on-year increase) worth a total of ₹299.74 trillion.

qa.question: What is UPI's standing among the world's real-time payment systems?
qa.answer: The world's LARGEST real-time payments platform — accounting for nearly half of all real-time transactions worldwide.

qa.question: What share of India's total digital payment volume does UPI command, and how many unique users does it have (early 2026)?
qa.answer: Nearly 85% of India's total digital payment volume; over 500 million unique users.

qa.question: What is UPI's projected daily transaction volume by FY2028?
